title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CarDekho - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at CarDekho - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CarDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CarDekho:
CarDekho is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarDekho!
